title: Red Blaze Low Carb Shawarma
description: A sour, juicy low-carb Egyptian dish featuring red chilli flakes and cooked on a tandoor to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 275°C (525°F). Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
In a mixing bowl, combine the tomato paste, red chilli flakes, turmeric powder, and olive oil. Mix well until smooth.
Add the seasoned chicken to the sauce mixture, turning to coat evenly on all sides. Marinate for 15 minutes.
Once the tandoor is hot, place the marinated chicken in and cook for about 8-10 minutes or until fully cooked through.
Remove from heat and serve with cilantro as a garnish.
